Admissions through MP ITI Online Portal · Duration as per NCVT/DGT guidelines
Admission Details →
How to Join

Admission Process

Merit-based admissions through the MP ITI Online Portal. Six simple steps to secure your place.

1
Register on MP ITI Portal
Create your profile using a valid mobile number and email ID on the official portal.
2
Fill Application Form
Select Rajaram Private ITI (Code: PU23000988), choose your trade, and submit.
3
Upload Documents
Upload 10th Marksheet, Aadhar, Domicile, Income Certificate, Samagra ID & T.C.
4
Merit-Based Allotment
Seats allotted based on Class 10th marks and government reservation norms.
5
Report to Institute
Bring originals for verification and complete fee payment to confirm admission.
6
Begin Training
Start your NCVT-certified trade training with workshops and industry curriculum.

Documents Required

Originals + 2 photocopies of each

1
10th Marksheet
2
Additional Qualification Certificate (if any)
3
निवास प्रमाण पत्र — Domicile Certificate
4
आय प्रमाण पत्र — Income Certificate
5
आधार कार्ड — Aadhar Card
6
समग्र आईडी — Samagra ID
7
2 Passport Size Photographs
8
Signature + Mobile + Email
9
T.C. — Transfer Certificate

Our Story

About Rajaram ITI

Transforming potential into expertise since 2016 — one skilled professional at a time.

Welcome to Rajaram Private ITI, located opposite the Railway Station in Chhatarpur, MP (ITI Code: PU23000988). Established on 21 December 2016, affiliated to NCVT under the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India.

We empower Chhatarpur's youth through industry-relevant training, hands-on experience, and a career-oriented environment that bridges academic education and real-world employment.

🏛️

Govt. Recognised

ITI Code PU23000988, structured NCVT curriculum.

🔬

Quality Training

Theory + practical for industry-relevant education.

👨‍🏫

Skilled Faculty

Experienced instructors guiding every student.

🏗️

Modern Labs

State-of-the-art workshops for hands-on training.

  • Bridge the gap between education and industry requirements

  • Deliver quality technical education aligned to NCVT standards

  • Develop skilled, confident professionals ready for the workforce
